name: ao3-rich-comment-editor
description: Format AO3 comments with rich text editing

scripts.start: npm install && npm run vendor && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.run:firefox: LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 MOZ_ACCELERATED=0 MOZ_DISABLE_RDD_SANDBOX=1 web-ext run --target firefox-desktop --verbose --start-url https://archiveofourown.org/works/86984576/chapters/230309206#workskin
